sourceSummary.oneLine: BOM part lists for Retrofit Detector models G1717CW/FW/CWP/FWP and G1417CW/FW/CWP/FWP, plus BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Design history file BOM source identifying assemblies, ERP codes, parts, specifications, suppliers, supply type, quantities, costs, and weights for listed detector models and accessory assemblies.
keyPoints: Each detector section is headed as a Retrofit Detector Part List with Type listed as CsI Type.
The listed detector OQC module assemblies include PSM-200100, PSM-200110, PSM-200120, PSM-200130, PSM-100100, PSM-100110, PSM-100120, and PSM-100130.
Common required accessories include labels, packing, console software, USB, Wi-Fi router, battery, VE Gender, cables, and VE adaptor.
Optional accessories include Cradle and CIB sections.
The BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy section includes a 7.0 meter VE Gender Cable under ERP code PSM-000102.

entities.name: INNOLUXE
entities.evidence: BLU(AUO)-1717 IGZO TFT Panel_도,Panel,P-AT3-NIN,0,"17*17 AUO IGZO Panel, 442x442x0.7T",,INNOLUXE

evidence.claim: The source is a BOM / Part List for Retrofit Detector products.
The detector products are identified as CsI Type.
G1717CW has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-200100.
G1717FW has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-200110.
G1717CWP has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-200120.
G1717FWP has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-200130.
G1417CW has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-100100.
G1417FW has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-100110.
G1417CWP has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-100120.
G1417FWP has OQC module assembly ERP code PSM-100130.
The BOM includes Cesium Iodide material with 99.999 purity and code 42404.
The BOM includes Thallium Iodide with code 428002234 as granule.
The BOM includes detector labels, sub labels, and box labels using SDR-C4335W PET label specification.
The required accessory section includes a BLUE_BATTERY_ASSY battery with 351P, 11.5V, 3,500mAh specification.
The required accessory section includes a VE Gender Cable, 3.5meter.
evidence.evidenceText: PSM-000100,BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy,Ass'y,PSM-000100,0,"VE Gender Cable, 3.5meter"

evidence.claim: The separate BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy section includes a VE Gender Cable, 7.0meter.
evidence.evidenceText: PSM-000102,BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy,Ass'y,PSM-000102,0,"VE Gender Cable, 7.0meter"

evidence.claim: The optional accessory section includes CRADLE IQC Module Assy.
The optional accessory CIB section includes ASSY COVER-ASSY UNIT-MIR_CIB_V2.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Document date is ambiguous: sourcePath contains 2025.07.14, detector approval rows show 2025-7-3, and the BLUE Gender IQC Module Assy section shows 2025-7-15.
The repeated value 704-9 (REV.00) appears to be a form or template revision; no formal standard is identified.
Source is a preprocessed spreadsheet-style text extraction with CSV-like rows and some irregular fields, so row alignment may require verification against the original XLSX.
